raw: {"perspective": "Product Strategist", "findings": [{"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "Energy Adaptation UI", "issue": "Energy Adaptation UI exists but does not dynamically adapt based on real-time user behavior or system load. Static thresholds are used, violating Law 2: Energy Adaptation which requires responsive, context-aware UI modes.", "recommended_fix": "Implement dynamic adaptation using real-time user interaction patterns and system load metrics. Update EnergyPicker to respond to behavioral signals (e.g., input latency, scroll velocity) and device conditions (CPU/battery)."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: Energy Adaptation UI exists but does not dynamically adapt based on real-time user behavior or system load. Static thresholds are used, violating Law 2: Energy Adaptation which requires responsive, context-aware UI modes.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement dynamic adaptation using real-time user interaction patterns and system load metrics. Update EnergyPicker to respond to behavioral signals (e.g., input latency, scroll velocity) and device conditions (CPU/battery).
